# 2Gather

> A faith-based togetherness app: real-time prayer chat, themed Bible verses, and
> life-situation "modes" that bring Scripture and prayer to the moment you're in.
> You were never meant to pray alone.

2Gather is an English-language web app for praying with others. It pairs a
real-time prayer chat with a curated, attributed Bible-verse engine (World English
Bible, public domain) and five life-situation Modes — Travel, Interview Prep,
Business Pitch, Promotion & Opportunity, and Downtime & Recovery — each of which
re-scopes the verse of the day and prayer prompts to what the user is walking
through.

## Principles

- Scripture is always quoted verbatim and attributed — never paraphrased or
  invented. AI is used only to recommend real verses from the curated corpus for
  a user's prayer request; it never writes the prayer.
- Reverent and non-denominational in tone.

## Key pages

- /: Landing — what 2Gather is and why.
- /login, /register: Account access.

## Features

- Prayer chat: send prayers and verses to others in real time.
- Verse engine: verse of the day, browse/search by theme, "find verses for what
  you're praying about".
- Modes: pick what you're walking through; verses + prayers re-scope to it.
- Journal: save verses and prayers with reflection notes.
